name: Flame Rod
desc: A staff specialized in creating and controlling crackling flames, formed from brass and charred wood and reinforced with flame essence.
prereqs: A creature must be flamebound to use this _Weapon_.
effect: This staff helps focus and refine flamecraft. It has a single Charge that represents a vast pool of elemental energy that can be tapped. Once the Charge has been used, it may not be used again until the staff has been planted in an open flame for several hours.

abilities.name: Flame Focus
abilities.effect: Gain 1 _Essence_ at _Respite_, or 3 if you spend the staffs Charge. At the end of _Respite_ you may spend up to 2 _Momentum_ to gain an equivalent amount of _Essence_.

abilities.name: Enhanced Craft
abilities.effect: If your spirit would gain _Stress_ to enhance your flamecraft you may instead lose the _Charge_ on this staff. Additionally, you have increased precision when using this item to aid in your craft.

name: Iron Dagger
desc: A small, versatile blade that has a myriad of uses.

analysis_notes.notes: 4+6 and 6+4 is two more potential Gambits for 5.55%, x2 for 2 Momentum

enhancements.name: Flurry
enhancements.effect: Use _Strike_ again. You may not apply this _Enhancement_ to the secondary attack.

enhancements.name: Find The Gap
enhancements.effect: You must have _Advantage_ to use this _Enhancement_. Add [_Pierce_ 2]. On a _Hit_+, deal +2 _Damage_.

enhancements.name: Precise Fling
enhancements.effect: Make this Attack at _Advantage_. On a _Graze_+, deal +1 _Bonus Damage_.

name: Iron Javelin
desc: A small, versatile blade that has a myriad of uses.

enhancements.name: Lunge
enhancements.effect: Range is instead 0. Deal +_0/1/1/2_ Damage.

enhancements.name: Hand-and-a-Half
enhancements.effect: If you are _Wielding_ this Weapon two-handed, deal +_0/1/2/3_ Damage.

enhancements.name: Hop Step
enhancements.effect: Create an [_Opening_] when you Attack, and you may not attack Targets closer than Range 1. Range is instead 2, and you deal +_0/1/2/3_ Damage.

name: Iron Throwing Knives
desc: Small blades meant for sudden, unexpected throws. They're unsuited for melee combat, but can be thrown with a high degree of accuracy.

enhancements.name: Precise Fling
enhancements.effect: Make this Attack at _Advantage_. On a _Graze_+, deal +1 _Bonus Damage_.

name: Iron Shortsword
desc: A light blade that offers a balance between power and speed.
special: You may pay 1 _Momentum_ to use this _Weapon_ as a _Light_ Attack. If you do, do not resolve the Effect.
parry: [_Block_] Gain +1 _Reflex_. If the triggering Attack is _Light_/_Versatile_, gain 1 _Guard_.

charged_profile.set_up: Choose a Target, making note of any remaining Speed you have. While _Charging_ gain the _Parry_ effect of this weapon.
charged_profile.resolution: Move [_Rush_] up to half the Speed you had remaining, then Attack the Target. On a _Graze_+ deal +2 _Damage_.

analysis_notes.notes: Expanded crit range and gaining Momentum on attack.

name: Iron Longsword
desc: A sword that grants the perfect flexibility between damage and speed. It is a favorite of travelers due to its versatility in combat.

enhancements.name: Hand-and-a-Half
enhancements.effect: Deal +_0/1/2/2_ Damage. If you are _Wielding_ this Weapon two-handed, instead deal +_1/2/2/3_ Damage.

enhancements.name: Thrusting Strike
enhancements.effect: Damage type is instead _Stab_. Add [_Pierce_ 2]. Deal +_0/2/3/4_ Damage.

analysis_notes.notes: 4+6 and 6+4 is two more potential Gambits for 5.55%, x2 for 2 Momentum

name: Round Shield
desc: A round shield made largely of wood capable of absorbing a large number of attacks.

abilities.name: Protective Shield
abilities.effect: Gain +2 _Block_. You do not have _Disadvantage_ to _Parry_ _Ranged_ Attacks. When _Parrying_, Attacks take a -1 _Penalty_ and you gain additional _Block_ equal to (1 + the Range the Attack was made from). These benefits stack with _Cover_.

enhancements.name: Heavy Slam
enhancements.effect: Add +_0/0/1/2_ Damage and _Push_ [_Grit_].

name: Iron Battleaxe
desc: A solid, hefty axe useful for hacking through a foes' defenses.

enhancements.name: Hand-and-a-Half
enhancements.effect: Deal +_0/1/2/2_ Damage. If you are _Wielding_ this Weapon two-handed, instead deal +_1/2/2/3_ Damage.

enhancements.name: Cleave
enhancements.effect: Do not make an _Attack Roll_. Instead, automatically _Graze_ all creatures in your _Engagement_.

enhancements.name: Hack
enhancements.effect:
You unleash an attack intended to hack through defenses and wood. Add _Exposed_ [_Grit_] to the Attack. If the target is:
	* A _Wood_ creature, gain a +1 to the _Attack Roll_ and add [_Pierce_ 2].
	* _Wielding_ _Wood_ _Equipment_, add _Shatter_, but you must target said Equipment.
	* _Wood_ _Terrain_, add [_Siege_].

analysis_notes.notes: 4+6 and 6+4 is two more potential Gambits for 5.55%, x2 for 2 Momentum

name: Quarterstaff
desc: A thick sturdy staff that is just as useful for battle as it is for traveling.

abilities.name: Walking Stick
abilities.effect: When traveling on uneven or difficult terrain you may remove a single _Affliction_ or _Fatigue_ _Danger_ related to said Terrain.

enhancements.name: Hand-and-a-Half
enhancements.effect: Deal +_0/1/1/2_ Stun and +_0/1/1/1_ Damage. If you are _Wielding_ this Weapon two-handed, instead deal +_0/2/3/3_ Stun and +_0/1/1/2_ Damage.

name: Stone Maul
desc: A crude maul made with a heavy stone that is far heavier than its metallic counterparts.

abilities.name: Whirl
abilities.effect: You begin to whirl your weapon, creating a dangerous area of denial. You become _Hobbled_, but it costs an additional _Speed_ to become _Engaged_ with you and creatures that spend _Speed_ or are forcibly moved within your _Arena_ must spend 1 additional _Speed_ or are are automatically _Grazed_ with <u>Strike</u>. If a creature your size or larger ends a _Turn_ _Engaged_ with you automatically _Graze_ them, then end this effect if they are not _Downed_. Also end this effect if you are _Downed_, knocked _Prone_, or _Disarmed_ of this weapon. While using this effect, you may not use this weapon for anything else.

enhancements.name: Powerful Finish
enhancements.effect: Pay this if a creature your size or larger ends a _Turn_ _Engaged_ with. Instead, use <u>Strike</u> against the Target [_Discount_ 4] with a +1 to the _Attack Roll_. If this does not _Defeat_ the Target, end this effect as normal.

enhancements.name: Smash
enhancements.effect: Add [_Pierce_ 4] and [_Unblockable_]. On a _Hit_+, all _Stun_ is instead _Damage_.

enhancements.name: Extend
enhancements.effect: Range is instead Range 0 [_Reach_]. Deal +2 _Stun_.

enhancements.name: Slam
enhancements.effect: Add _Shatter_ and _Prone_ [_Grit_].

enhancements.name: Driving Impact
enhancements.effect: Add _Push_ [_Grit_].

enhancements.name: Cleave
enhancements.effect: Do not make an _Attack Roll_. Instead, automatically _Graze_ all creatures in your _Engagement_.

enhancements.name: Greater Cleave
enhancements.effect: Automatically _Graze_ all other valid targets _Engaged_ with the _Target_.

name: Hunting Sling
desc: A simple weapon with a windup that pierces through many defenses.
effect: A small pouch of slingstones is included with this weapon that is comprised of _Source_ 0 (_Earth_) stones to be used as Missiles. If you ever run out of ammunition, you may always collect more the next time you make Camp as a free action.

abilities.name: Loose
abilities.effect: Create an [_Opening_], then Attack a Target within Range.

enhancements.name: Whirl
enhancements.effect: Add [_Pierce_ 2] to the Attack and, on a _Hit_+, deal +1 Damage. You may only Attack Targets at Range 2 when making the Attack in this way.

name: Hunting Bow
desc: A bow excellent for hunting game, but also for taking shots at foes.
effect: You must have a _Quiver_ and arrows to use this Weapon.

enhancements.name: Full Draw
enhancements.effect: Create an [_Opening_] when you Attack, and you may not attack Targets closer than Range 2. Deal +_0/2/4/5_ Damage.

enhancements.name: Arcing Shot
enhancements.effect: Range is instead 3, and you take no penalties due to _Cover_. The Target has _Advantage_ to _Dodge_ this Attack.
